description: Deterministic ID: source_key + tab + range + timestamp.
Logical source key, for example LIVE_SHEET_MVP_QAIC_DEV.
Finite A1 range used for read-only extraction.
Local CSV/XLSX snapshot file path relative to repo.
Detected data rows when local snapshot is available.
Detected max columns when local snapshot is available.
UTC timestamp when snapshot/manifest is generated.
